name: gitbank
description: Connect your GitHub-linked Web3 vault to Kimi Code. Check balances, transactions, and project bounties on Base L2.
author: Gitbank

interface.shortDescription: Web3 IssueOps tools via MCP. Vault balances, transactions, and bounty tracking on Base L2.
interface.longDescription: Gitbank brings your on-chain GitHub vault into Kimi Code. Ask about vault balances, transaction history, project budgets, and connected repositories without leaving your coding session.
